concerns.text: FR-003 requires a General Linear Model (GLM) analysis to test activation differences and model parametric modulation. Task T033 only implements 'permutation testing'. While T031 mentions 'GLM analysis', it is vague on the specific parametric modulation requirement. A dedicated task explicitly implementing the GLM beta-estimation for feedback discrepancy (as distinct from the permutation test) is missing to ensure FR-003 is fully covered.

SC-002 mandates measuring the model convergence rate against a ≥ 90% threshold. Task T025b generates a 'convergence report' but lacks a specific sub-task to calculate the global rate and explicitly verify/flag if it meets the 90% threshold required by SC-002.

FR-006 requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping the 'belief-updating threshold/cutoff'. Task T036a describes sweeping thresholds on 'alpha parameter and feedback discrepancy', which is ambiguous and may not cover the specific 'cutoff' sweep required to verify robustness of headline correlation rates as defined in FR-006.

Plan P2 specifies a target sample size of N=30 and a 6-hour runtime limit with specific MCMC settings (4 chains, 2000 samples). Task T024 implements the model fitting logic but lacks a corresponding task to enforce these specific runtime constraints or dynamically adjust samples if the N=30 target causes a timeout on the 2-CPU runner.

SC-001 requires measuring the exclusion rate against a 10% threshold. Task T018 implements the filter to exclude participants with >10% volumes exceeding 3mm translation, but there is no explicit task to calculate and report the final exclusion rate against the SC-001 threshold in the final output.
